master_row.title: Magnetic Helicity Evolution Evolution Relation
master_row.canonical_statement: \mathbf{B}) \times (\nabla \times \delta \mathbf{B}) \end{equation} where: \begin{itemize} \item $\xi$ = displacement field (acoustic) \item $v_A = \frac{B}{\sqrt{\mu_0 \rho}}$ = Alfvén velocity \item $\delta \mathbf{B}$ = magnetic field perturbation \end{itemize} \subsection{Topological Mode Coupling} The magnetic helicity (topological invariant) couples to acoustic modes: \begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_M = \int_V \mathbf{A} \cdot \mathbf{B} \, dV - \frac{\omega_{gyro}}{c^2} \int_V \mathbf{r} \times (\mathbf{E} \times \mathbf{B}) \, dV \end{equation} Time derivative under acoustic modulation: \begin{equation} \frac{d\mathcal{H}_M}{dt} = \int_V \left( \frac{\partial \mathbf{A}}{\partial t} \cdot \mathbf{B} + \mathbf{A} \cdot \frac{\partial \mathbf{B}}{\partial t} \right) dV + \mathcal{O}(\omega_{acoustic}) \end{equation} \section{Harmonic Topology Access Mechanisms} \subsection{Type I: Alfvén Resonance Ladder} \begin{theorem}[Alfvén Mode Quantization] In a spherical cavity of radius R with permeable boundary $\mu_r$, Alfvén waves satisfy: \begin{equation} \omega_{n\ell m} = \frac{v_A}{R} \sqrt{n^2 + \frac{\ell(\ell+1)}{1 + \frac{R}{2\delta_{skin}}}} \end{equation} where n, $\ell$, m
